explanation: Dimensions: [H] = L, [sigma] = M T^-2, [rho] = M L^-3, [g] = L T^-2, [R] = L. Hence M: a + b = 0; T: -2a - 2c = 0, so c = -a; L: -3b + c + d = 1. The invariance under g -> lambda g and R -> lambda R gives c + d = 0, so d = -c = a. Also b = -a. Substituting into the length equation gives 3a = 1, so a = 1/3. Thus (a, b, c, d) = (1/3, -1/3, -1/3, 1/3).
